case_title: HOUSEHOLD FINANCE CORPORATION OF CALIFORNIA vs. CHRETIEN, JACK C. AKA JACK C. CHRETIEN JR. et al

docket_entries.description: RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF HOUSEHOLD FINANCE CORPORATION OF CALIFORNIA AS TO DEFENDANT CHRETIEN, JACK C. AKA JACK C. CHRETIEN JR. SACHIETTI, ANNE MARIE
